stemHtml: In a typical bootstrap cooling system, the supply air is…

options.a: passed across an expansion turbine, then directly to the heat exchanger.
options.b: passed across an expansion turbine, then compressed and passed through a secondary heat exchanger.
options.c: passed across an expansion turbine, then through a secondary heat exchanger and then across a compressor.
options.d: compressed, passed through a secondary heat exchanger, and then across an expansion turbine.
